description: Shared ESLint base configuration for Gravity UI projects with TypeScript rules. Does NOT include React, a11y, Prettier, or import-order rules — those are separate optional sub-configs.
Optional Prettier-compatible ESLint sub-config for Gravity UI projects. Add this alongside the base config when using Prettier to disable rules that conflict with Prettier formatting.
Optional accessibility (a11y) ESLint sub-config for Gravity UI projects. Add this alongside the base config to enable rules that catch accessibility issues.
Optional import-order ESLint sub-config for Gravity UI projects. Add this alongside the base config to enforce a convention on module import ordering.
